business.name: Steve Sutton Plumbing and Heating Supplies

sample_reviews.author: Dave Hartley
sample_reviews.text: Brilliant local supplier — always have what I need in stock. Prices are fair and the staff really know their stuff. My go-to for all plumbing parts.

sample_reviews.author: Karen Booth
sample_reviews.text: Really helpful team, managed to source a hard-to-find boiler part same day. Saved me a long wait from online suppliers. Would definitely recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Phil Norris
sample_reviews.text: Used Steve Sutton's for years as a plumber. Reliable stock, honest pricing and always good advice over the counter. Wouldn't go anywhere else in North Manchester.

brand.usp: A trusted trade counter in the heart of Moston, supplying plumbers and heating engineers across North Manchester with quality parts, expert advice, and competitive pricing — all under one roof.
brand.hero_headline: Quality Plumbing & Heating Supplies in Manchester
brand.about_paragraph: We've been supplying plumbers, heating engineers, and DIY homeowners across North Manchester for years from our Moston trade counter. Whether you need boiler spares, pipework, valves, or bathroom fittings, we keep a comprehensive stock so you can get in and out without delays. We pride ourselves on knowing our products inside out and giving honest, practical advice to every customer who walks through our door.
